coffees.name: Caffe Mocha
coffees.description: A cappuccino is an approximately 150 ml (5 oz) beverage, with 25 ml of espresso coffee and 85ml of fresh milk the foam.

coffees.name: Flat White
coffees.description: Flat white is a coffee drink consisting of espresso with microfoam, resulting in a stronger flavor with a velvety texture.

coffees.name: Cappuccino
coffees.description: Cappuccino is an espresso-based coffee drink prepared with steamed milk foam.

coffees.name: Americano
coffees.description: Caffe Americano is prepared by diluting an espresso shot with hot water.
